user.title: Synology Active Backup for Business
user.description: Connect to your Synology NAS to monitor Active Backup for Business tasks.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of your Synology NAS
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable this only if you use a self-signed certificate

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.description: The account on {host} has two-factor authentication enabled. Enter the current code from your authenticator app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with {host}
reauth_confirm.description: The integration could not log in. Enter a new password to re-authenticate.

reauth_two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication — {host}
reauth_two_factor.description: Enter the current code from your authenticator app to complete re-authentication.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Synology NAS is already configured.
